distractors.off_target_set: Goals with clear paths and predictable outcomes; mature markets with established playbooks; optimization problems with known variables; meta-questions about effectuation
distractors.description: Items where the future is predictable enough for causal planning, and effectuation's means-driven approach adds no value

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND format_length_control_pass
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
